zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Lexham於1426年6月11日出生在英國諾福爾可韋斯特 萊可哈姆時，她的父親Sir William Lexham36歲，母親Margaret Oldhall22歲。她於大約1450年與John Semark在英國瓦維其可爾沃里克結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1485年3月16日在英國英格蘭米德萊可維斯特明斯特享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice Lexham于1426年6月11日出生在英国諾福爾可韋斯特 萊可哈姆时，她的父亲Sir William Lexham36岁，母亲Margaret Oldhall22岁。她于大约1450年与John Semark在英国瓦維其可爾沃里克结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1485年3月16日在英国英格兰米德萊可維斯特明斯特享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lexham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  Scottish: (i) locative name from Leitholm (Berwicks). (ii) locative name from the lands of Letham in Dunnichen (Angus).
2  English: perhaps a variant of   Leatham  ,  see  Latham  .

variants.name: Latham
meanings: English: habitational name from Lathom in Lancashire, or occasionally perhaps from Laytham in Yorkshire. The placenames mean ‘at the barns’, from hlǫthum, the dative plural form of Old Norse hlatha ‘barn, store house’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Lexham was born on 11 June 1426, in West Lexham, Norfolk, England, her father, Sir William Lexham, was 36 and her mother, Margaret Oldhall, was 22. She married John Semark about 1450, in Warwick, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died on 16 March 1485, in Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Lexham est née le 11 juin 1426, à West Lexham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Lexham, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret Oldhall, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John Semark environ 1450, à Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 mars 1485, à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice Lexham am 11. Juni 1426 in West Lexham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Lexham 36 und ihre Mutter Margaret Oldhall 22. Sie hat um 1450 in Warwick, Warwickshire, England John Semark geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. März 1485 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Lexham è nata il il 11 giugno 1426 nel West Lexham, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Sir William Lexham, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Margaret Oldhall, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato John Semark circa 1450, nel Warwick, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 16 marzo 1485, nel Westminster, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Lexhamが1426年6月11日にイギリスノーフォルクウエスト レクスハムで生まれた時，父Sir William Lexhamは36歳，母Margaret Oldhallは22歳であった。約1450年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアワーウィックでJohn Semarkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1485年3月16日にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Lexham(이)가 1426년 6월 11일 영국 노르폴크 웨스트 렉스함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Lexham(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Oldhall(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1450년 영국 워윅실르 워윅에서 John Semark(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1485년 3월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.11 June 1426–16 March 1485: 11 de junho de 1426–16 de março de 1485
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Lexham nasceu em 11 de junho de 1426, em West Lexham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Lexham, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Oldhall, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John Semark aproximadamente 1450, em Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de março de 1485, em Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Lexham родилась 11 июня 1426 г. в местности вест лексхам, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Lexham было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Oldhall, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Semark около 1450 г. в местности варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла 16 марта 1485 г. в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.

es.11 June 1426–16 March 1485: 11 de junio de 1426–16 de marzo de 1485
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Alice Lexham nació el 11 de junio de 1426, en West Lexham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Lexham, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margaret Oldhall, tenía 22 años. Se casó con John Semark aproximadamente 1450, en Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 16 de marzo de 1485, en Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años.
